tracks.rawText: 4:12Galaxia Aprendidav5.5Reggae rock dub metal with a sound-first intro: sub-bass rumble, reversed cymbal hit, and distant feedback before skanking offbeat guitar, Hammond organ stabs, dub delay throws, and spring-reverb snare, Heavy drop-tuned guitars and half-time double-kick explode in the chorus; gritty bass, tape echo, and dense wall-of-sound texturesPublishRemix
tracks.title: Galaxia Aprendida

tracks.rawText: 1:18Transportationv5.5CoverReggae clásico de los años 80 con influencias dancehall, ritmo relajado pero enérgico, bajo profundo y cálido, batería con patrón one-drop, guitarra rítmica con staccato, arreglos con teclados tipo órgano jamaicano y toques de sintetizador vintage, voces melódicas y expresivas con estilo caribeño, atmósfera festiva y positiva, mezcla con sensación analógica y reverb espacialPublishRemix
tracks.title: Transportation

tracks.rawText: 3:50Michelle Ramosv5.5neo-psychedelia reggae fusion with soft trap influence, lush female vocals dripping confidence and cosmic glamour, shimmering synths, deep bass, elegant rhythm, “Quantum Luxurious” — luxury as a state of mind, dripping gold and starlight, sensual and introspective vibePublishRemix
